reviews.review_description: My father left me because of this game, BEST GAME EVER, 5 stars

I finally came back to the game and when I looked at my hands I was confused, it wasn't like this before, when I went to the city and went to the mirror, IT WAS HORRIFYING, THE MODELS USED TO BE GREY LOOKING BUT NOW IT LOOKS LIKE A SQUISHED CHIMP, the new models look disturbing and ugly, I highly prefer the old ones.

developer_response.body: We are currently experimenting with the player model at the moment and whatever was in the game is temporary. If you have any suggestions join the discord and let us know.

reviews.review_description: Cupid change my mind about the game, a brown moderator with the top hat we were playing kick tag. We all agreed that it was OK to be kick and then he was trying to say that I was being disrespectful for no reason Cupid change. My mind is a very nice moderator and I am going to start playing this game again no disrespect to the other moderators.

developer_response.body: thanks for the change of mind

reviews.review_description: You should definitely download this game 😘

This game is not the best at the moment but I still tried it out and even talked to the creator myself, and   I said to him that if I could walk around in the game, then I would give it a 5 star review, keep it up it’s already great dude 👍
I love this game it is so much fun horror to and I would love if creators of this game gave me moderater Ngl goated ahh game so good

reviews.review_title: Good game but has a problem
reviews.review_description: I really like this game but every time I play it really laggy an always crashes on me. I dont know why but I think it's because the game has to much going on. But when I play it the screen  inverts and splits in half one side straight up and the other side flipped up side down but I can still hear people will this get patched?

developer_response.body: This is a oculus problem and I already put a sign out regarding this. I would deeply appreciate if you would change it to five star as it really helps the game rating.

reviews.review_description: This game is just a fun place to vibe and run around with your friends, but it has an uneasy felling even if your alone... Also I hear someone splashing in the lake even when I'm alone... Somethings going on here, anyways great silly manke game👍👍👍👍BUY MARBLES!!!

reviews.review_title: Alr this is the kinda game I like...
reviews.review_description:
I love da hood.             





And everything else
The game is very fun you get to play with others and customize your character and the game has secrets
It is really hard to move, but everything else great, love your game synaptic 🫶
The graphics are beautiful and the community is awesome. Best game ever I recommend playing!
The game is amazing good quality  game  for a gorilla tag fan made 100% buy it and it's  for  !free?
